headline: Week’s Best: ChatGPT to Offer Money Advice
summary: ChatGPT plans to turn its premium artificial intelligence offering into a financial counselor, of sorts.  Parent company OpenAI says that premium users, who pay a monthly subscription rate of $100 to $200, will be able to link their financial accounts to its chatbot and receive insights on how they might handle their money.  Have chip stocks flown too close to the sun? Semiconductor stocks have been on a tear, but will it last, or is a correction at hand?

headline: How The AMC Global Media (AMCX) Narrative Is Shifting Around Risk, Valuation And Execution
summary: The latest analyst update on AMC Global Media keeps the fair value target steady at US$7.50 per share, even as underlying model inputs shift. With Street debate focusing on how much risk to assign to the stock at this level and an Underweight stance at Morgan Stanley, that unchanged US$7.50 figure sits at the center of a cautious but closely watched narrative. As you read on, you will see how this target fits into the evolving story and what to watch to stay on top of future...
